Li Jun Êùé‰øä
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Jun (Êùé‰øä)was born in Wudu commandery. Local lord used by Jiang Xu to defeat Ma Chao. Li Jun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
